description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Commit that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: darglint and build_posix. The darglint job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox darglint. The build_posix job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9-dev, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox with various options.
